message:
fix(tests): repair fleet and update module JSON output tests

- fleet/dry_run: Use ApiResponse format instead of raw JSON for dry_run output
- fleet/mod: Add JSON output for rollback dry_run mode
- update/mod: Set up test config directory override for fleet tests
- commands: Make set_test_config_dir_override pub(crate) for test access

Fixes 4 failing unit tests:
- fleet::tests::deploy_dry_run_emits_json_response
- fleet::tests::rollback_dry_run_emits_json_response
- update::tests::test_update_fleet_dry_run
- update::tests::test_update_fleet_json_mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
